zh.Annesley, Nottingham, England: 英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾安斯利
zh.Of, Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England: 英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾安斯利

zh.Of,Annesley,Nottinghamshire,England: 英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾安斯利
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Anesle於1238年8月4日出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾安斯利時，他的父親Sir Reginald De Annesley58歲，母親Hawise Honskerle39歲。他於1260年與Annora Pierrepont在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾安斯利結婚。他們至少是7個兒子的父母。他於1285年被列為sheriff of nottinghamshire, derbyshire and the royal forests。他去世於1315年9月8日在英國諾廷加姆爾安斯利享年77歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Anesle was born on 4 August 1238, in Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Reginald De Annesley, was 58 and his mother, Hawise Honskerle, was 39. He married Annora Pierrepont in 1260, in Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons. In 1285, at the age of 47, his occupation is listed as sheriff of nottinghamshire, derbyshire and the royal forests. He died on 8 September 1315, in Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Anesle est né le 4 août 1238, à Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Reginald De Annesley, avait 58 ans et sa mère, Hawise Honskerle, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Annora Pierrepont en 1260, à Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils. En 1285, à l’âge de 47 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of nottinghamshire, derbyshire and the royal forests. Il est décédé le 8 septembre 1315, à Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Anesle am 4. August 1238 in Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Reginald De Annesley 58 und seine Mutter Hawise Honskerle 39. Er hat 1260 in Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Annora Pierrepont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne. 1285, als er 47 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of nottinghamshire, derbyshire and the royal forests aufgeführt. Er starb am 8. September 1315 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Anesle è nato il il 4 agosto 1238 nel Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Reginald De Annesley, aveva 58 anni e il suo madre, Hawise Honskerle, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Annora Pierrepont nel 1260, nel Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli. Nel 1285, all'età di 47 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of nottinghamshire, derbyshire and the royal forests. Morì il 8 settembre 1315, nel Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Anesleが1238年8月4日にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアアネスリーで生まれた時，父Sir Reginald De Annesleyは58歳，母Hawise Honskerleは39歳であった。1260年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアアネスリーでAnnora Pierrepontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子の親であった。1285年，47歳の時，職業はsheriff of nottinghamshire, derbyshire and the royal forestsと記録されている。彼は1315年9月8日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアアネスリーで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Anesle(이)가 1238년 8월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 아네슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Reginald De Annesley(은)는 58세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise Honskerle(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1260년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 아네슬리에서 Annora Pierrepont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들을 두었다. 1285년, 47세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sheriff of nottinghamshire, derbyshire and the royal forests이었다. 그는 1315년 9월 8일 영국 노틴그함실르 아네슬리에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.4 August 1238–8 September 1315: 4 de agosto de 1238–8 de setembro de 1315
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Anesle nasceu em 4 de agosto de 1238, em Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Reginald De Annesley, tinha 58 anos e sua mãe, Hawise Honskerle, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Annora Pierrepont em 1260, em Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos. Em 1285, com 47 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of nottinghamshire, derbyshire and the royal forests. Ele faleceu em 8 de setembro de 1315, em Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Anesle родился 4 августа 1238 г. в местности аннесли, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Reginald De Annesley было 58 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise Honskerle, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Annora Pierrepont в 1260 г. в местности аннесли, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей. В 1285 году, в возрасте 47 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of nottinghamshire, derbyshire and the royal forests. Он умер 8 сентября 1315 г. в местности аннесли, ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 77 лет.

es.4 August 1238–8 September 1315: 4 de agosto de 1238–8 de septiembre de 1315
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Anesle nació el 4 de agosto de 1238, en Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Reginald De Annesley, tenía 58 años y su mamá, Hawise Honskerle, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Annora Pierrepont en 1260, en Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos. En 1285, a la edad de 47 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of nottinghamshire, derbyshire and the royal forests. Murió el 8 de septiembre de 1315, en Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 77 años.
